claim.proof_method: identity initial monomial for all row sets; shifted Vandermonde audit for contiguous row sets
claim.summary: For every 385 <= A <= 426, every maximal row-set regular Hankel minor det(H_{t,j}(u)+Z H_{t,j}(v)) is generically nonzero and has exact degree j+1.

nonclaims: does not prove any particular syndrome pencil is nonsingular
does not enumerate roots over F_17^32
does not clear the finite-slope 2^-128 budget
does not classify determinant-zero singular strata
